accurate.why: Claims about the bill's provisions and policy riders are consistent with the bill text and known content of the act.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all described provisions are real.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as FY2025 appropriations for military construction, VA, and related agencies.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes key conditions including notification requirements, policy riders on abortion, gender-affirming care, COVID mandates, DEI, CRT, and Guantanamo restrictions.

effective_dates.why: Notes FY2025, construction funds through September 30, 2029, and extended VA medical care availability.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all four titles and major appropriations categories with key conditions.

concise.why: Appropriately detailed for a complex multi-title appropriations bill.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names VA, DOD, American Battle Monuments Commission, U.S. Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims, and the Armed Forces Retirement Home.

correct_figures.why: Correctly identifies FY2025 and September 30, 2029 availability for construction funds.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
